programme.title: American Grown: My Job Depends on Ag
programme.desc: Two men discuss farming, California water policies and the future of agriculture.

programme.title: Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: The story behind David Attenborough's wildlife documentary series "Life on Earth," which changed his life forever.

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: How discoveries over the past 50 years have revolutionized people's understanding of the universe.

programme.title: Shared Planet
programme.desc: From Kenya to Mexico, people and wildlife find a harmonious balance in Earth's most vulnerable landscapes.

programme.title: Life on Earth: Attenborough's Greatest Adventure

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: The Mustangs: America's Wild Horses
programme.desc: With more than 80,000 wild horses on federal lands and more than 50,000 in government corrals, filmmakers Steven Latham and Conrad Stanley reveal why the protection of America's wild horses is more important than ever.

programme.title: Great Scenic Railway Journeys 30th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Some of America's best railway adventures, from the Rocky Mountaineer to the Skyrail, these stories offer a glimpse into our nation's railroad history and explore how railroads defined the spirit of North America.

programme.desc: Lyla trains Stu to help at the diner; Stu learns how to ride a scooter.

programme.desc: Corky is selected to make a presentation at school during a science day celebration, but humidity jeopardizes her project.

programme.sub-title: Daniel Likes to Be With Dad; Daniel Likes to Be With Mom

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Jay and Lupe use wayfinding signs to track down Phoebe; Pete and Craig face an epic hoops battle on the courts.

programme.desc: Rosie and Javi get a new book, but it's in a different language; Rosie tries to form a club with her friends.

programme.desc: Ari grows impatient waiting for ketchup; Elinor, Olive and Ari have to figure out how to expand their clubhouse to fit all the new members of The Explorer's Club.

programme.title: Life Unearthed With Ariel Waldman
programme.desc: In Beacon Valley, explorer Ariel Waldman reveals hidden ecosystems that persist despite extreme conditions.

programme.title: Life Unearthed With Ariel Waldman
programme.desc: Often overlooked, North America's tallgrass prairies are among the most dynamic and biodiverse ecosystems on Earth.

programme.title: BBC News The Context
programme.desc: A regular panel of guests from across the political spectrum discuss the biggest international stories of the day.

programme.title: Julie Taboulie's Lebanese Kitchen

programme.desc: Father Brown investigates when rehearsals for "A Most Perfect Murder" are derailed by a dramatic death.

programme.desc: Alastair Bruce examines how aristocrats behaved in the 1900s Britain, including how they dined, dressed and interacted with servants.

programme.title: The Count of Monte Cristo on Masterpiece
